title: libavcodec/rasc: Heap Use-After-Free in decode_move
summary: decode_move keeps a GetByteContext pointing into s->delta; a type-0 move replaces s->delta via av_fast_padded_malloc, so subsequent loop iterations read move-table fields out of the freed region — heap UAF read of attacker-controlled bytes.

title: avformat/rtspdec: Heap Buffer Underflow in rtsp_read_announce
summary: RTSP listen mode parses Content-Length as signed int; an oversize value wraps to -1, the av_malloc(0) fallback returns 1 byte, and sdp[-1] = '\0' lands one byte before the allocation.
